gov_com.title: --- Governmental Command ---
gov_com.description: The Governmental Command is responsible for the overall management of the Calderia, including the management of all departments and the military.

s_dod.name: [SDOD] Secretary of the Department of Defense

ds_dod.name: [DSDOD] Deputy Secretary of the Department of Defense

dod_hq.title: --- Department of Defense Headquarters ---
dod_hq.description: The DOD HQ is responsible for the overall management of the Calderian Military inclusing the Army, Airforce, and Navy.

seacsb.name: [SEACSB] Senior Enlisted Advisor to the Chief of Staff Board

army_hq.title: --- Army Headquarters ---
army_hq.description: The Army HQ is responsible for the overall management of the Calderian Army.

vcas.name: [VCAS] Vice Chief of the Army Staff

of.title: --- Officer Ranks ---
of.description: Officer Ranks are the ranks of all commissioned officers in the Calderian Army. They are responsible for leading soldiers and managing operations.
of.hto: Rank up in a branch or apply through an application to earn officer ranks.

or.title: --- Other Ranks ---
or.description: Other Ranks are the ranks of all non-commissioned officers and enlisted personnel in the Calderian Army. They are responsible for carrying out orders and performing various tasks.
or.hto: Rank up in a branch or apply through an application to earn other ranks.
